title: × microcattleya cattleyioides

parts: × microcattleya cattleyioides has many medicinal parts, such as its leaves and roots, which contain various bioactive compounds. The leaves of the × microcattleya cattleyioides plant are known to contain flavonoids like quercetin and kaempferol, which have been traditionally used for their anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The roots of the plant are rich in alkaloids, including berberine and palmitic acid, which have been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever and digestive issues. side_effects: × microcattleya cattleyioides can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, skin irritation, and gastrointestinal issues.
